message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles, Zap, Star } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator Gem Farming: Complete Guide & Tips 2026",
  description: "Master anime tactical simulator gem farming with our comprehensive 2026 guide. Learn how to use codes, clear the Tower, and optimize World Quests for maximum rewards.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Gem+Farming+Mastery",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Anime tactical simulator gem farming** relies heavily on completing **Major World Quests** and pushing through the **Tower Mode**.
- **Active Codes** are the fastest way for beginners to jumpstart their progress with thousands of free gems.
- **Tower Mode** provides 50 gems per standard floor and a massive **500 gem bonus** every fifth floor.
- **Gamepasses** such as +2 Equips and Card Access should be your first priority when spending farmed gems.
- **Luck stats** significantly impact your ability to pull Secret and Tactical units, which are essential for high-level farming.
</Callout>

In the competitive landscape of Roblox battle simulators, mastering **anime tactical simulator gem farming** is the definitive line between a casual player and a leaderboard contender. Gems serve as the premium currency required to unlock gamepasses, summon mythic-tier units, and reroll powerful talents that define your damage output. Without a steady stream of gems, progressing through difficult regions like the Demon Slayer or Solo Leveling worlds becomes an uphill battle.

This guide provides a professional breakdown of every viable farming method available in 2026. We will explore the intricacies of the Tower reward system, the most efficient questing routes, and how to leverage luck-based mechanics to maximize your returns. Whether you are a free-to-play enthusiast or looking to optimize your resource management, these strategies will ensure your squad remains at the cutting edge of the meta.

<Section icon={Map} title="Getting Started: The Foundation of Gem Farming">

Success in Anime Tactical Simulator begins with understanding that gems are not dropped by random enemies; they are earned through specific milestones and activities. For new players, the initial focus should be on clearing the early worlds of Dragon Ball and One Piece to unlock the core features of the lobby.

**Video Highlights:**
- **Initial Progression**: How to use codes and spins to get your first scaling units.
- **Tower Efficiency**: Strategies for clearing floors quickly to earn consistent gem rewards.
- **Unit Management**: The importance of ascension and mythic souls for increasing damage.
- **Endgame Content**: A look at the Solo Leveling world and the Egress raid.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="q3X3ieusO9A" title="Best Beginners Guide For Anime Tactical Simulator" />

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Tip">
Always check your inventory for potions before starting a farming session. Luck and Damage potions can significantly decrease the time required to complete Major World Quests.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Zap} title="Active Codes and Instant Rewards">

The fastest method for **anime tactical simulator gem farming** in the early game is redeeming active developer codes. These codes provide a massive influx of gems and essential items like Dungeon Keys and Potions, allowing you to bypass the initial grind.

| Code | Gem Reward | Additional Items | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **RELEASE** | 500 Gems | 5 Dungeon Keys | Active |
| **UPDATE1** | 1000 Gems | 10 Potions | Active |
| **MILESTONE** | 750 Gems | 5 Potions | Active |
| **LAUNCH** | 1000 Gems | 10 Dungeon Keys | Active |

<Callout type="warning" title="Redemption Requirement">
To redeem these codes, you must first join the official Tsukikage Roblox community and "Like" the game. Failing to do so will result in an invalid code error.
</Callout>

Beyond codes, the **Playtime Rewards** system provides passive income simply for staying logged in. These rewards are located near the spawn building and scale based on your continuous session time. Additionally, the **Daily Spin** (available every 30 minutes) offers a chance at gems, potions, and even scaling units like Algard.

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Tower Mode: The Infinite Gem Source">

Tower Mode is the most reliable long-term source for **anime tactical simulator gem farming**. Unlike world quests which are finite, the Tower allows you to push your limits for escalating rewards. Each floor cleared provides a base amount of gems, while milestone floors offer substantial bonuses.

| Floor Type | Gem Reward | Bonus Rewards |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Standard Floor** | 50 Gems | Experience / Gold |
| **Every 5th Floor** | 500 Gems | Rare Potions / Keys |
| **Floor 75 Milestone** | Large Gem Pack | Extra Unit Slot Unlock |
| **Floor 100+** | Scaled Gems | High-tier Artifacts |

<Callout type="info" title="Tower Mechanics">
Clearing the Tower doesn't just give gems; it is the primary way to unlock additional unit slots. Having more units equipped directly increases your total DPS, making subsequent gem farming much faster.
</Callout>

To maximize efficiency in the Tower, you should focus on units with high Area of Effect (AoE) damage. Tactical units like Kokushibo or Yorui are preferred here, as they can clear waves of enemies in seconds.

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="World Quests and Boss Farming">

Each world in Anime Tactical Simulator features a set of Major Quests and Side Quests. While side quests often reward Yen or Dragon Balls, Major Quests are a primary pillar of **anime tactical simulator gem farming**.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Accept Major Quests">
    Locate the primary NPC in each world (e.g., Goku in DBZ World, Luffy in One Piece World). These quests usually require defeating a specific number of enemies or a mini-boss.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Optimize Team Composition">
    Ensure your team consists of at least Mythic or Secret units. Use the Ascension pedestal in the lobby to sacrifice duplicate units and gain a 25% to 100% damage boost.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Focus on Boss Drops">
    Bosses like Guut in the Demon Slayer world or Egress in Solo Leveling drop tokens and gems. These tokens are used to roll for powerful traits like **Annihilator** or **Dead Eye**.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Progress to New Worlds">
    Each new world offers a fresh set of quests, typically rewarding 500 gems per completion. Do not linger in early worlds once your power level allows you to move on.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="success" title="Quest Efficiency">
Completing a full set of Major Quests in a new world can net you upwards of 3,000 to 5,000 gems. This is usually enough to purchase a mid-tier gamepass or several multi-summons.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Luck Optimization for Better Pulls">

While not a direct way to farm gems, increasing your **Luck Stat** ensures that the gems you spend result in higher-tier units. High-tier units allow you to clear harder content (like the Tower) faster, creating a positive feedback loop for your **anime tactical simulator gem farming** efforts.

<Checklist
  id="luck-optimization"
  title="How to Maximize Your Luck:"
  items={[
    "Obtain the Sunju Raid accessory for a 20% luck boost",
    "Roll for the 'God's Blessing' trait (150% luck per unit)",
    "Use Shenron's wishes to gain a permanent +1 Luck increase",
    "Equip a full team of units with the Fortune trait",
    "Activate Luck Potions before any major summoning session"
  ]}
/>

By stacking these bonuses, you can reach over 2,000% increased luck. This is critical for obtaining **Tactical Units**, which have a base drop rate as low as 0.5% but offer significantly higher damage than standard Mythics.

<Callout type="tip" title="Trait Strategy">
For the best damage-to-luck ratio, aim for units with **Annihilator** and **Dead Eye**. This combination provides 100% more damage and a 50% critical chance, allowing you to breeze through gem-rewarding content.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Strategic Spending: Where to Use Your Gems">

Farming gems is only half the battle; spending them wisely is what defines your progression speed. In Anime Tactical Simulator, certain permanent upgrades are far more valuable than temporary summons.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Priority 1: Unit Equips">
    Unlocking **+2 Unit Equips** is the single best investment. More units mean more damage, faster clears, and easier gem farming.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Priority 2: Card Access">
    The **Card Access** gamepass allows you to roll for units in the background while you continue to farm bosses or clear the Tower.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Priority 3: Luck Boosts">
    Permanent luck upgrades ensure that every gem spent on summons has a higher probability of yielding a Secret or Tactical unit.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

| Upgrade | Cost (Gems) | Impact on Farming | Priority |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **+2 Unit Equips** | 3,000 - 7,000 | Massive DPS increase | **High** |
| **Card Access** | 5,000 | Background rolling | **High** |
| **2x Gold** | 3,000 | Faster stat training | **Medium** |
| **VIP Status** | 10,000 | Extra rewards/daily | **Low** |

<Callout type="info" title="Free-to-Play Friendly">
Unlike many other simulators, Anime Tactical Simulator allows you to purchase almost all Gamepasses using gems earned through gameplay. This makes the game highly accessible for players who prefer not to spend Robux.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Star} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What is the best way to start anime tactical simulator gem farming as a beginner?",
    answer: "The best start is to redeem all active codes (RELEASE, UPDATE1, etc.) to get your first 3,000+ gems. Use these to summon a few Mythic units and then immediately start pushing the Tower for the 500-gem milestone rewards."
  },
  {
    question: "How often can I get gems from the Tower?",
    answer: "You receive gems every time you clear a new floor. While you cannot farm the same floor repeatedly for the same reward, the Tower currently has over 100 floors, providing a massive one-time pool of gems."
  },
  {
    question: "Do world bosses drop gems directly?",
    answer: "Bosses typically drop Yen and Tokens rather than gems. However, defeating them is often a requirement for Major World Quests, which reward large amounts of gems upon completion."
  },
  {
    question: "Which gamepass should I buy first with my farmed gems?",
    answer: "You should prioritize the '+2 Unit Equips' gamepass. Increasing your team size from 3 to 5 units nearly doubles your damage output, which is essential for clearing higher Tower floors and endgame raids."
  }
]} />

</Section>
